Other Rollz Locations

Looking for Rollz in other cities? Visit Rollz Ice Cream Canada for all locations including Kelowna, Red Deer, and more.

Rollz Ice Cream Vancouver

  • Rollz Vancouver
  • info@rollzyvr.com

    Vancouver's freshly rolled ice cream destination. Handcrafted Thai-style rolled ice cream, waffles, milkshakes & faloodas at 2685 Main St. Order pickup via Clover, buy gift cards, and explore 50+ flavors.
